title: I'm export exceljs with angular after export system show Error Checking
author: KanKai
body: I would like close warning

comments.author: skypesky
comments.body:
@KanKai 
hello, What does this warning show? How to reproduce this error? Is there a test case?

comments.author: NegiKiran
comments.body:
check if you are passing number not string

this
```
this.worksheet.getCell('A1').value = 5;
```
not this
```
this.worksheet.getCell('A1').value = "5";
```
